query:
INSERT INTO outbox (
                id, event_id, event_type, event_version, aggregate_type,
                aggregate_id, partition_key, payload, headers,
                created_at, dispatched_at, dispatch_attempts, last_error
            )
            SELECT
                id, event_id, event_type, event_version, aggregate_type,
                aggregate_id, partition_key, payload, headers,
                created_at, NULL, 0, NULL
            FROM outbox_dlq
            WHERE id = $1
